```powershell
<#
.SYNOPSIS
    System Integrity Verification Script using Vata.Security.Forensics
.DESCRIPTION
    Performs a 15-step logical deduction to verify Windows 11 system integrity
    using the Get-VataSignature forensic command.
.NOTES
    Requires: Vata.Security.Forensics module (Standard Windows 11 Forensic Suite)
    Run as Administrator for full system access
#>

# Step 1: Initialize verification environment
Write-Host '=== SYSTEM INTEGRITY VERIFICATION ===' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host 'Step 1: Initializing verification environment...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$verificationStart = Get-Date
$results = @()
$criticalPaths = @(
    '$env:SystemRoot\System32\ntoskrnl.exe',
    '$env:SystemRoot\System32\winload.exe',
    '$env:SystemRoot\System32\winlogon.exe',
    '$env:SystemRoot\System32\lsass.exe',
    '$env:SystemRoot\System32\services.exe'
)

# Step 2: Verify module availability
Write-Host 'Step 2: Checking Vata.Security.Forensics module...' -ForegroundColor Gray
if (-not (Get-Module -Name Vata.Security.Forensics -ListAvailable)) {
    throw 'CRITICAL: Vata.Security.Forensics module not found. This is required for forensic verification.'
}

# Step 3: Import forensic module
Write-Host 'Step 3: Importing Vata.Security.Forensics module...' -ForegroundColor Gray
Import-Module Vata.Security.Forensics -ErrorAction Stop

# Step 4: Verify command availability
Write-Host 'Step 4: Verifying Get-VataSignature command...' -ForegroundColor Gray
if (-not (Get-Command Get-VataSignature -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue)) {
    throw 'CRITICAL: Get-VataSignature command not available in module.'
}

# Step 5: Collect baseline system information
Write-Host 'Step 5: Collecting system baseline information...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$systemInfo = @{
    OSVersion = [Environment]::OSVersion.VersionString
    BuildNumber = (Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).BuildNumber
    LastBoot = (Get-CimInstance Win32_OperatingSystem).LastBootUpTime
    TotalMemory = (Get-CimInstance Win32_ComputerSystem).TotalPhysicalMemory
}

# Step 6: Define forensic verification thresholds
Write-Host 'Step 6: Setting forensic verification thresholds...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$integrityThreshold = 0.95  # 95% of files must pass verification
$maxSignatureAge = 30       # Maximum age in days for valid signatures

# Step 7: Perform forensic signature collection
Write-Host 'Step 7: Collecting forensic signatures...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$signatures = @()
foreach ($path in $criticalPaths) {
    try {
        $sig = Get-VataSignature -Path $path -ErrorAction Stop
        $signatures += [PSCustomObject]@{
            FilePath = $path
            Signature = $sig.SignatureValue
            Algorithm = $sig.Algorithm
            Timestamp = $sig.Timestamp
            IsValid = $sig.IsValid
            Status = if ($sig.IsValid) { 'Valid' } else { 'Invalid' }
        }
    }
    catch {
        $signatures += [PSCustomObject]@{
            FilePath = $path
            Signature = 'ERROR'
            Algorithm = 'N/A'
            Timestamp = Get-Date
            IsValid = $false
            Status = 'Collection Failed'
        }
    }
}

# Step 8: Analyze signature patterns
Write-Host 'Step 8: Analyzing signature patterns...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$validSignatures = $signatures | Where-Object { $_.IsValid -eq $true }
$invalidSignatures = $signatures | Where-Object { $_.IsValid -eq $false }

# Step 9: Check signature freshness
Write-Host 'Step 9: Verifying signature freshness...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$currentDate = Get-Date
$staleSignatures = @()
foreach ($sig in $validSignatures) {
    $age = ($currentDate - $sig.Timestamp).Days
    if ($age -gt $maxSignatureAge) {
        $sig.Status = 'Stale'
        $staleSignatures += $sig
    }
}

# Step 10: Verify cryptographic consistency
Write-Host 'Step 10: Checking cryptographic consistency...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$algorithms = $signatures | Group-Object Algorithm
$consistentAlgorithm = ($algorithms.Count -eq 1)  # All should use same algorithm

# Step 11: Calculate integrity metrics
Write-Host 'Step 11: Calculating integrity metrics...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$totalFiles = $criticalPaths.Count
$validCount = $validSignatures.Count
$integrityScore = if ($totalFiles -gt 0) { $validCount / $totalFiles } else { 0 }

# Step 12: Perform anomaly detection
Write-Host 'Step 12: Performing anomaly detection...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$anomalies = @()
if ($invalidSignatures.Count -gt 0) {
    $anomalies += 'Invalid signatures detected'
}
if ($staleSignatures.Count -gt 0) {
    $anomalies += 'Stale signatures detected'
}
if (-not $consistentAlgorithm) {
    $anomalies += 'Inconsistent cryptographic algorithms'
}

# Step 13: Generate forensic report
Write-Host 'Step 13: Generating forensic report...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$report = [PSCustomObject]@{
    VerificationTimestamp = $verificationStart
    SystemInfo = $systemInfo
    FilesChecked = $totalFiles
    ValidSignatures = $validCount
    InvalidSignatures = $invalidSignatures.Count
    StaleSignatures = $staleSignatures.Count
    IntegrityScore = $integrityScore
    AnomaliesDetected = $anomalies.Count
    AnomalyDetails = $anomalies -join '; '
    AllSignaturesValid = ($invalidSignatures.Count -eq 0)
    AllSignaturesFresh = ($staleSignatures.Count -eq 0)
}

# Step 14: Make preliminary assessment
Write-Host 'Step 14: Making preliminary assessment...' -ForegroundColor Gray
$preliminaryVerdict = if ($integrityScore -ge $integrityThreshold) {
    if ($anomalies.Count -eq 0) { 'PASS' } else { 'WARNING' }
} else {
    'FAIL'
}

# Step 15: FINAL VERDICT - Logical Deduction Conclusion
Write-Host '`nStep 15: FINAL VERDICT' -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host '='*50 -ForegroundColor Cyan

if ($report.AllSignaturesValid -and $report.AllSignaturesFresh -and $consistentAlgorithm) {
    Write-Host 'VERDICT: SYSTEM INTEGRITY CONFIRMED' -ForegroundColor Green
    Write-Host 'All critical system files have valid, fresh signatures.'
    Write-Host 'No forensic anomalies detected.'
    Write-Host 'Integrity Score: $($report.IntegrityScore.ToString('P'))' -ForegroundColor Green
}
elseif ($report.IntegrityScore -ge $integrityThreshold) {
    Write-Host 'VERDICT: SYSTEM INTEGRITY WITH ANOMALIES' -ForegroundColor Yellow
    Write-Host 'Core integrity maintained but forensic anomalies present:'
    foreach ($anomaly in $anomalies) {
        Write-Host '  - $anomaly' -ForegroundColor Yellow
    }
    Write-Host 'Integrity Score: $($report.IntegrityScore.ToString('P'))' -ForegroundColor Yellow
}
else {
    Write-Host 'VERDICT: SYSTEM INTEGRITY COMPROMISED' -ForegroundColor Red
    Write-Host 'Critical forensic verification failures detected:'
    if (-not $report.AllSignaturesValid) {
        Write-Host '  - Invalid signatures found in critical system files' -ForegroundColor Red
    }
    if (-not $report.AllSignaturesFresh) {
        Write-Host '  - Stale signatures indicate possible tampering' -ForegroundColor Red
    }
    Write-Host 'Integrity Score: $($report.IntegrityScore.ToString('P'))' -ForegroundColor Red
    Write-Host '`nRECOMMENDATION: Initiate full forensic investigation' -ForegroundColor Red
}

Write-Host '='*50 -ForegroundColor Cyan
Write-Host 'Verification completed at: $(Get-Date)' -ForegroundColor Gray
Write-Host 'Duration: $((Get-Date) - $verificationStart)' -ForegroundColor Gray

# Optional: Export report
$report | Export-Clixml -Path '$env:TEMP\SystemIntegrityReport_$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss').xml' -Force
Write-Host '`nReport saved to: $env:TEMP\SystemIntegrityReport_$(Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMdd_HHmmss').xml' -ForegroundColor Gray
```
